channel.title: Giampaolo Rodola - tests
channel.description: Python enthusiast, core developer, psutil author

item.title: Speeding up pytest startup
item.description:
Preface: the migration to pytest¶

Last year, after 17 years of unittest, I started adopting pytest in psutil (see #2446). The two advantages I cared about most were plain assert statements and pytest-xdist's free parallelism. Tests still inherit from unittest.TestCase and there's no conftest.py or fixture use …
item.dc:creator: Giampaolo Rodola
